base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of energy_bars — a ui from 1987 mega man. HP/weapon energy bars — 28 fill-level variants + icons (M for Mega Buster, C/G/E/I/F/B for Robot Master weapons). Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: HP/weapon energy bars — 28 fill-level variants + icons (M for Mega Buster, C/G/E/I/F/B for Robot Master weapons)
